original: \n\nIt’s too much. You can’t keep up the facade of fighting her any longer.
\n\nYou stumble back, more aroused by the view than you care to admit.
leaving you intimately aware of the feeling of her devilishly hot member grinding on your [pc.thigh]
leaving you intimately aware of the pressure of her dick on your [pc.armor]
. She licks the lobe of your ear, whispering, “I could do things to you that no mere woman or man could dream of.”
\n\nThe horny dick-girl doesn’t bother resisting when you push her away, but her scent and warmth remain.
You’re enjoying this far too much to push her away.

\n\n“Oh... fuck it.” the aggressive pirate lets her machinegun drop. It bounces off the deck, clattering noisily before ricochetting into a crate thanks to the zero-G. “It looks like you get to live, assuming you can finish what you’ve started.”

\n\nWith her hands freed, Kaska is able to take her length, now about ten inches, and rub it, milking a few drops of pre into her other palm without ever taking her eyes off you. She stops after a second and flicks a dollop your way. It slaps into your cheek. “I have missed having a harem. You can be my first ".concat(e.mf("‘wife’","wife"),".”")
